title: Following an Academic Lecture
description: Signposts, hedged claims, visual references, note-taking strategies.
summary_pt_br: Acompanhando aula: sinalizadores, linguagem hedged, referências visuais, anotar por sinal.

scenes.subtitle_en: Signposts, hedged claims, visual references, note-taking strategies.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Acompanhando aula: sinalizadores, linguagem hedged, referências visuais, anotar por sinal.

scenes.text_en: Signposts, hedged claims, visual references, note-taking strategies. Focus: following an academic lecture. Let me turn now to the second half of the argument.
scenes.text_pt: Acompanhando aula: sinalizadores, linguagem hedged, referências visuais, anotar por sinal. Foco: following an academic lecture. Passemos agora à segunda metade do argumento.

scenes.title: Following an Academic Lecture
scenes.body_en: Lecturers signpost: 'In the next section...', 'Crucially...', 'Let me turn to...'. Hedging: 'It could be argued that...'. Take notes by the signpost, not word by word.
scenes.body_pt: Acompanhando aula: sinalizadores, linguagem hedged, referências visuais, anotar por sinal.

examples.en: Let me turn now to the second half of the argument.
examples.pt: Passemos agora à segunda metade do argumento.

examples.en: Crucially, the data only covers one decade.
examples.pt: Crucialmente, os dados cobrem só uma década.

examples.en: As the graph on slide twelve suggests...
examples.pt: Como o gráfico do slide 12 sugere...

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Following an Academic Lecture

exercise.question: Complete: "Let me turn now to the second half of the ___."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Let me turn now to the second half of the argument."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Passemos agora à segunda metade do argumento.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Crucially, the data only covers one decade.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Crucially, the data only covers one decade."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Crucialmente, os dados cobrem só uma década.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Following an Academic Lecture — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre following an academic lecture. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How do you decide what to write down?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Follow the signposts, not every word.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Only the ones that change a claim.
turns.pt_hint: Só os que mudam a afirmação.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I note the slide number, then synthesize later.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How do you review notes afterward?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Rewrite as one-sentence claims within 24 hours.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Lectures are listening exercises in disguise.

scenes.title: The history lecture
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize the lecturer's main claim and one hedged point. Use at least two academic terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In the large lecture hall, Kumar attended a history lecture to practice the discipline of listening for structure.

paragraphs.speaker: Lecturer
paragraphs.en: Let me turn now to the second half of the nineteenth century, and specifically to its industrial upheaval.

paragraphs.speaker: Lecturer
paragraphs.en: Crucially, the data we rely on covers only western Europe — the global picture was far more uneven.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: I wrote down each signpost the lecturer used, not every fact she mentioned along the way.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: It could be argued that our textbooks inherit exactly these geographic blind spots without even noticing.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Following a lecture well, Kumar believed, is the earliest rehearsal for giving a good one yourself.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Following an Academic Lecture". Signposts, hedged claims, visual references, note-taking strategies. Let me turn now to the second half of the argument. Crucially, the data only covers one decade. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Following an Academic Lecture". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Following an Academic Lecture".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Following an Academic Lecture".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
